Entries.Text: Row Name Manipulation
Adjust
Use this tool to quickly add to or remove from the row names of your current row selection.
Inherit
Use this tool to quickly fill in row names based on your current row selection and the parameter references they link to internally.
Replace
Use this tool to search and replace strings within the row names of your current row selection, allowing for easy standandization.
Text to Add
The string to pre or post pend to the existing name.
Actions
Clear Row Name
Clear the row names from the current row selection.
Prepend Text to Row Name
Prepend the specific text to the row names from the current row selection.
Postpend Text to Row Name
Postpend the specific text to the row names from the current row selection.
Remove Text to Row Name
Remove the specific text from the row names from the current row selection.
Target Field
The internal name of the field to target for the name actions.
Proliferate Name into Param Reference
Proliferate the name of this row to the references pointed to by the named field within this row.
Inherit Name from Param Reference
Inherit the name of the referenced row connected to via the target field.
Inherit Name from FMG Reference
Inherit the name of the referenced FMG connected to via the target field.
Inherit Name from Alias
Inherit the name of the referenced Alias connected to via the target field.
Target Strings
The strings within the row name to target.
Replacement String
The string that replaces the targeted string(s) within the row name.
Add a new target string entry.
Remove the last-added target string entry.
Add a new target string entry.
Reset
Teset the target string entry list.
A target string to replace in a row name.
Replace
Replace the target string(s) within the currently selected row's names with the replacement string.
